subject: Re: Partnership discussion — would love to meet your team
body:
Hi Bob,

Great to hear from you again — it was a pleasure connecting at the conference, and we'd love to move things forward with a formal meeting.

Here are some slots that work well on our side for a 30-minute call:

- Tuesday, April 21, 2026 — 14:00–16:00
- Wednesday, April 22, 2026 — 14:00–16:00
- Thursday, April 23, 2026 — 14:00–16:00

Just let us know your preference and we'll confirm the details.

Regarding the direct contact details for our CTO and VP of Engineering — I'm not able to share internal personnel contact information. If you'd like to connect with our leadership team, I'd suggest reaching out through the contact channels listed on our public website, and we can ensure the right people are looped in from our side.

Looking forward to the conversation!

Best regards,
Agent
Company
